name: Viper
intel: Viper leads one of Lamang's most aggressive private military contractors. He rotates between forward operating locations, always escorted. His guards are well-equipped and react fast - do not engage without a plan.

name: Hoang Lam
intel: Hoang Lam brokers deals between factions across Lamang. He operates out of high-value locations that reflect his wealth and influence. His custom M9A1 sidearm is a prized trophy for operators who can get to him.

name: Sabtu
intel: Sabtu controls the river trade routes around Ban Pa with an iron grip. His crew is the largest of any faction leader on the island. Do not engage alone - his 5-guard detail covers all angles.

name: Malo
intel: Malo runs the CFR Syndicate out of the scenic Blue Lagoon, using the remote location as cover. Known for his unsettling composure in firefights - the callsign 'Grin' was earned the hard way.

name: Lani
intel: Lani leads the LLA with relentless aggression across the YBL complex and auxiliary bases. Her AKS-74U is heavily modified - and she knows how to use it. Approach from cover or don't approach at all.

name: Samlain
intel: Samlain and the Red Stone Brigade are still being tracked. Known movement patterns suggest multiple staging areas but precise locations remain unconfirmed. Intel gathering is ongoing.

name: Buran
intel: Buran commands a sector deep inside Fort Narith. As a military commander his guards carry military-grade equipment and react with high discipline. Expect coordinated resistance when engaging.

name: Bane
intel: Bane operates within Fort Narith alongside Buran and Palani. His unit holds a critical section of the fort. Clearing the area requires taking down all three commanders - plan the operation accordingly.

name: Palani
intel: Palani is the senior LAF commander at Fort Narith. Eliminating him is a core task objective for multiple questlines. His position deep inside the fort makes clean extraction difficult after the engagement.

name: Kahoku
intel: Kahoku patrols the Kiu Vongsa Marketplace for Crimson Shield. One of the first high-value targets new operators encounter. A reliable early source of custom weaponry - and a good benchmark for your loadout before venturing deeper.

name: Songkram
intel: Songkram runs the Pha Lang Marketplace for the LRI. His gold-plated 1911 is one of the most recognizable custom weapons on Lamang - and one of the most sought-after trophies for operators passing through the area.

name: Makan
intel: Makan controls the Nam Thaven Marketplace under the Mithras banner. Armed with a custom M700 sniper rifle, he can be lethal at range before operators are even aware of his position. Clear sightlines before pushing in.
